titulo: The same is available for a linear rental as for daily accommodations, but a minimum of 3 days.
lugar: La Habana
descripcion:
It has 3 bedrooms.
The master room with an interior bathroom, AC, TV set, ceiling fan, safe.
The other 2 rooms with the same conditions, but an interspersed bathroom.
The apartment has an air-conditioned room and a TV set with additional channels. Dining room, gas kitchen equipped with everything and portal. Water heater. Wifi and landline telephone. The apartment can be rented for linear rentals with either 2 or 3 bedrooms. At the moment maximum 4 people due to the problem with the water supply due to the energy deficit.

titulo: Suitable for linear rental of one room, without electrical issues.
precio: $500 USD monthly flat rate, $35 USD per night
descripcion:
Hot and cold water, electric stove, minibar, ideal for students or a couple without children.
The apartment consists of one bedroom, living room, kitchen equipped with a stove, oven, microwave, and all essential kitchen utensils,
bathroom with hot and cold water, air conditioning, automatic washing machine, TV, etc.
Balcony facing the street, first floor.
Located in Lagunas, two blocks from the Malecon, in an underground area with no power outages so far.
